data.title: Nomad Foods Ltd. to release Q4 and FY 2025 financial results on Feb 26, 2026. Company listed on NYSE: NOMD. Management discussion to be included.
data.description: Nomad Foods Limited, a company listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker NOMD, is set to release its financial results for the fourth quarter concluding on December 31, 2025. The announcement date is scheduled for Thursday, February 26, 2026. The report will include a press release as well as supplementary materials, which will consist of a pre-recorded discussion by the management team. This update was shared from Woking, England.

data.title: US credit union regulator plans to establish federal licensing rules for payment stablecoins from credit union subsidiaries.
data.description: The US National Credit Union Association is proposing to establish a federal licensing system for payment stablecoins offered by credit union subsidiaries. This new regime will come with specific standards that must be adhered to by these institutions. This move aims to regulate the use of stablecoins within the credit union sector to ensure compliance and safety. It is part of the association's efforts to enhance transparency and accountability in the use of stablecoins. This step is crucial as stablecoins have gained prominence in the financial sector, with over X credit unions presently considering incorporating them into their operations.

data.title: ARTDAI unveils Collection Data Management System for family offices, streamlining collection records with live market analytics.
data.description: ARTDAI introduced the Collection Data Management System (CDMS) in New York on February 12, 2026. The system transforms scattered collection records into instant documentation by utilizing live market analytics and enterprise security. CDMS is tailored for family offices, private institutions, and organizations dealing with large volumes of data. This launch marks a significant step towards efficient data management in the industry, providing users with real-time insights and security protocols to streamline their operations.

data.title: NETSOL Technologies reports 21% growth in total net revenues for Q2 fiscal 2026 to $18.8 million, with services revenues up 40.9% and gross margin expanding to 48.0%. Operating income was $1.3 million compared to a loss of $0.5 million. Cash and cash equivalents were up 4.0% to $18.1 million. Recurring subscription and support revenues increased 5.1% to $9.1 million. Total net revenues for the six months ended December 31, 2025, were $33.8 million, with gross profit at $14.9 million. Loss from operations was $0.5 million. Cash and cash equivalents were $18.1 million as of December 31, 2025.
data.description: NETSOL Technologies, Inc. (NASDAQ: NTWK) reported its results for the second fiscal quarter of 2026, with total net revenues up 21.1% to $18.8 million. Services revenues increased by 40.9% to $9.6 million, recurring subscription and support revenues up by 5.1% to $9.1 million, and gross margin expanded to 48.0%. Operating income was $1.3 million, compared to a loss of $0.5 million. Cash and cash equivalents increased by 4.0% to $18.1 million. For the six months ended December 31, 2025, total net revenues were $33.8 million, with recurring subscription and support revenues up by 7.2% to $18.0 million and total services revenues up by 17.9% to $15.6 million. Gross profit was $14.9 million, and loss from operations was $0.5 million. Cash and cash equivalents were $18.1 million as of December 31, 2025. NETSOL Technologies aims to deliver AI-enabled solutions for the asset finance and leasing industry, enhancing revenue growth, margin improvement, and targeted investment to build sustainable shareholder value. Management will hold a conference call to discuss financial results further.

data.title: Icon Plc stock crashes on accounting probe, investigating revenue recognition for 2023-2025. Overstated revenue by <2% in 2023-24. Earnings update causes investor concern.
data.description: Shares of Icon Plc (NASDAQ: ICLR) are plummeting in premarket trading due to news of an ongoing internal investigation launched by its Audit Committee in late October 2025. The investigation is focused on certain accounting practices and internal controls, particularly regarding revenue recognition for fiscal years 2023 through 2025. External legal counsel, along with forensic and technical accounting firms, are leading the probe initiated in response to concerns raised by management. Preliminary findings suggest that revenue for 2023 and 2024 may have been overstated by less than 2% each year. Icon anticipates reporting one or more material weaknesses in internal controls over financial reporting. The investigation has halted normal reporting processes, causing uncertainty among investors.

data.title: Yellow Pages Limited reported positive financial results for Q4 2025, with revenues of $48.0M, Adjusted EBITDA of $10.1M, and a cash balance of $64M. Dividend of $0.25/share declared.
data.description: Yellow Pages Limited, a Canadian digital media and marketing company, reported its financial results for the quarter and year ending December 31, 2025. The company's total revenues decreased by 7.4% in 2025 compared to a 10.3% decline in 2024, reaching $198.9 million for the year. Adjusted EBITDA for the year was $43.0 million. The company had a cash balance of approximately $64 million at the end of January. The Board declared a dividend of $0.25 per share to be paid on March 16, 2026. For the fourth quarter of 2025, total revenues were $48.0 million, down 6.5% year-over-year, with Adjusted EBITDA less CAPEX totaling $10.1 million. Net income for the quarter was $7.6 million. The company planned to make additional pension plan contributions of $4.0 million by June 2026, with $2.0 million approved for the first quarter of 2026.

data.title: FDA grants Fast Track Designation to 99mTc-maraciclatide by Serac Healthcare Limited for inflammation visualization in lung disease.
data.description: In London on February 12, 2026, Serac Healthcare Limited revealed that their groundbreaking molecular imaging agent, 99mTc-maraciclatide, has received Fast Track Designation from the US Food and Drug Administration (FDA). This designation aims to accelerate the development and review process for the diagnostic technology. Serac Healthcare Limited is a clinical radiopharmaceutical company focused on advancing innovative medical solutions.

data.title: Kelly reported 2025 full-year revenue of $4.3 billion, down 1.9%, with a full-year free cash flow of $114 million, up sixfold from the prior year. Q4 revenue was $1.1 billion, down 11.9%. Adjusted EBITDA for Q4 was $21.0 million, with the company expecting organic growth in the second half of 2026. Loss per share in 2025 was $7.24. Company declared a dividend of $0.075 per share, payable on March 11, 2026. Further details are available on Benzinga.com.
data.description: Kelly, a specialty talent solutions provider, reported its fourth-quarter and full-year 2025 earnings. Full-year revenue was $4.3 billion, down 1.9% as reported. Free cash flow for the year increased sixfold to $114 million. The company completed $10 million of Class A share repurchases in Q4 and deployed a total of $158 million towards debt repayment, share repurchases, and dividends for the year. Q4 operating loss was $0.7 million, with adjusted EBITDA of $21.0 million, reflecting an adjusted EBITDA margin of 2.0%. Despite challenges, Kelly expects to return to organic revenue growth and adjusted EBITDA margin expansion in the second half of 2026. The financial outlook for 2026 forecasts an improvement in revenue and adjusted EBITDA margin in successive quarters, leading to modest year-over-year revenue growth and measurable margin expansion in the second half of the year. On February 10, the board of directors declared a dividend of $0.075 per share, payable on March 11, 2026. The company also executed share repurchases of $10.0 million during Q4 2025 and will host a live webcast to review results. Kelly's revenue in 2025 was $4.3 billion. Key figures include a 11.9% decrease in Q4 revenue, $21.0 million in adjusted EBITDA for Q4 2025, and adjusted EBITDA margin of 2.0%. The company's financial statements and balance sheets are also detailed in the article.

data.title: Italy's trade show, KEY 2026, focuses on clean energy with 1,000 exhibitors, including 32% international, to be held in Rimini from March 4th to 6th. Europe and Africa are key players.
data.description: In early March 2026, the Italian Exhibition Group will host the KEY 2026 event at the Rimini Exhibition Center, featuring 1,000 brands showcasing their products. Notably, 32% of these brands are international, highlighting the event's global reach. The focus of the event is on Europe as a central player in the future of energy worldwide, with Africa also playing a significant role. The event, set to take place from March 4th to 6th in Rimini, Italy, promises to bring together industry leaders and experts to discuss and shape the future of the energy sector.

data.title: Coinbase to report Q4 earnings expectations at $1.05 per share, revenue at $1.84 billion - analysts' revised forecasts.
data.description: Coinbase Global, Inc. (NASDAQ: COIN) is set to announce its fourth-quarter earnings after the market closes on Thursday, February 12. Analysts are predicting earnings of $1.05 per share for the quarter, a decrease from $3.39 per share reported in the same period last year. The expected revenue for the quarter is $1.84 billion, lower than the $2.27 billion generated a year ago. Data from Benzinga Pro indicates that Coinbase has exceeded revenue expectations in seven of the last 10 quarters, including the most recent third quarter. The company's shares closed at $153.20 on Wednesday, marking a 5.7% decrease. For more details on analyst ratings, readers can visit the Analyst Stock Ratings page on Benzinga's website.
